TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Raga’, title = Raga’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raga’} }

S.FORM: alang Raga' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 10 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raga' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga Khpan. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga Sbunaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Raga' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 10 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raga' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga Khpan. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga Sbunaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raɣaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa ***% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kħpan. taj mkjaħuʔ na raɣaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕβunaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
